# FixTheVuln — Full Site Index

> Free cybersecurity education platform with interactive tools, certification study planners, practice quizzes, vulnerability tracking, and compliance guides.

FixTheVuln (fixthevuln.com) helps security professionals and students learn cybersecurity through hands-on tools and structured study resources. The site covers 60+ certification paths across CompTIA, AWS, Microsoft, Cisco, ISC2, ISACA, GIAC, EC-Council, OffSec, Google Cloud, HashiCorp, and Kubernetes. All content is free.

Generated: 2026-03-09

## Hub & Navigation Pages

- [About](https://fixthevuln.com/about.html)
- [CVE Lookup](https://fixthevuln.com/cve-lookup.html)

## Certification Comparisons (41 pages)

- [A+ vs. Network+](https://fixthevuln.com/comparisons/a-plus-vs-network-plus.html)
- [AWS CLF vs. AWS SAA](https://fixthevuln.com/comparisons/aws-clf-vs-aws-saa.html)
